prompt: Create a cinematic wide 16:9 sci-fi environment concept art scene of a small white utility spaceship landed in a dark ancient forest at night. The ship is parked side-on in a small clearing beside a shallow reflective pool in the foreground, surrounded by towering redwood-like tree trunks, deep black background shadows, ferns, broad-leaf plants, moss, rocks, scattered crates, hoses, and small ground equipment. The ship has a chunky retro-futuristic design like a compact shuttle/helicopter hybrid: rounded rectangular fuselage, white worn paint, panel seams, vents, grime streaks, landing struts, a rear ramp or stairs open on the right, a dark glass cockpit window at the front right, a side engine pod on the left with a glowing warm orange intake, a small top rotor assembly with 4 long dark blades, and a raised oval radar dish on the upper left side. Include exactly 5 prominent ship markings: a large red number "379" on the side, a black block label "E10" near the cockpit, a red angular emblem on the white radar dish, one orange triangular warning decal, and one small black X mark. A small seated pilot or mechanic is barely visible in the cockpit doorway area. Lighting should be dramatic and painterly: moonless night forest with strong warm spotlights hitting the ship and tree trunks, deep green-black shadows, subtle reflections in the water, high contrast, cinematic composition, detailed but not photorealistic, inspired by high-end animated sci-fi concept art. Use 379 as the largest side number, E10 as the black cockpit-side label, dark redwood forest at night, and quiet mysterious landing site. Avoid extra readable text, avoid modern cars or buildings, avoid a bright daytime sky, and keep the ship grounded and partially integrated into the forest clearing.
